id.description: Unique identifier for the Property entity.

serialNo.description: Unique serial number for the property (auto-generated).

autoTitle.description: Automatically generated title for the property (e.g., '5 Marla House in Harbanspura').

city.description: City where the property is located.

area.description: Area or neighborhood of the property.

propertyType.description: Type of property (e.g., House, Plot, Flat).

sizeValue.description: Numeric value of the property size.

sizeUnit.description: Unit of measurement for the property size (e.g., Marla, SqFt).

storey.description: Number of storeys in the property.

meters.description: JSON object indicating meter availability (electricity, gas, water).

potentialRentUnit.description: Unit for the potential rental income (e.g., Thousand, Lacs).

frontFt.description: Frontage of the property in feet.

lengthFt.description: Length of the property in feet.

demandUnit.description: Unit for the asking price (e.g., Lacs, Crore).

documents.description: Text field for document names related to the property.

isRecorded.description: Indicates if the property has been recorded.

recordingLinks.description: JSON object containing links to recordings (e.g., TikTok, YouTube).

status.description: Status of the property (e.g., Available, Reserved, Sold).

createdBy.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Property) User ID of the user who created the property.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the property was created.

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the property was last updated.

soldAt.description: Date and time when the property was sold.

buyerId.description: Reference to Buyer. (Relationship: Buyer 1:N Property) ID of the buyer who purchased the property.

tags.description: JSON object containing tags associated with the property.

customFields.description: JSON object containing custom fields for the property.

Buyer.title: Buyer
Buyer.description: Represents a potential buyer of real estate.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Buyer entity.

serialNo.description: Unique serial number for the buyer (auto-generated).

budgetMinAmount.description: Minimum budget amount of the buyer.

budgetMaxAmount.description: Maximum budget amount of the buyer.

budgetUnit.description: Unit for the buyer's budget (e.g., Lacs, Crore).

propertyTypePreferences.description: JSON object containing the buyer's preferred property types.

sizeMin.description: Minimum size preference of the buyer.

sizeMax.description: Maximum size preference of the buyer.

sizeUnit.description: Unit of measurement for the buyer's size preference (e.g., Marla, SqFt).

areasPreferred.description: Text field or array containing the buyer's preferred areas.

status.description: Status of the buyer (e.g., Interested, Not Interested, Follow Up).

assignedTo.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Buyer) ID of the agent assigned to the buyer.

createdBy.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Buyer) ID of the user who created the buyer record.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the buyer record was created.

updatedAt.description: Date and time when the buyer record was last updated.

User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

passwordHash.description: Hashed password of the user.  Note:  Do not store plain text passwords.

role.description: Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Agent, Viewer).

avatar.description: URL or path to the user's avatar image.

createdAt.description: Date and time when the user account was created.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Appointment entity.

propertyId.description: Reference to Property. (Relationship: Property 1:N Appointment) ID of the property associated with the appointment.

buyerId.description: Reference to Buyer. (Relationship: Buyer 1:N Appointment) ID of the buyer associated with the appointment.

agentId.description: Reference to User. (Relationship: User 1:N Appointment) ID of the agent associated with the appointment.

scheduledAt.description: Date and time when the appointment is scheduled.

status.description: Status of the appointment (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Missed).

notes.description: Notes or comments about the appointment.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Represents a service offered by the agency.

ProvidedService.title: Provided Service
ProvidedService.description: Represents an instance of a service provided to a client.

definition.description: Stores user profile information.  Top-level collection for user data.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier of the user.

definition.description: Stores services offered by an agency.
Stores logs of services provided to clients.
